events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: staged materials, wrong hanger for joist size. Work hasn't begun. Need to select correct replacement approach. Decision should be fail because non-compliant. Risk medium/high. Component conditions: non-compliant (staged wrong material). Not installed-defective since not installed. Actually "installed-defective" may not apply since staged. Use non-compliant. percent_complete 0. value 0. confidence high.

    "Staged joist hanger is wrong size for the joist being installed; hanger must match joist size and load rating per manufacturer catalog and IRC prescriptive requirements"

  "actions": [
    "Remove the incorrect hanger from the work package and replace with the Simpson hanger model specified for the actual joist size and span/load condition",
    "Verify hanger seat width, flange height, and nail schedule against the Simpson catalog before installation",
    "Install with manufacturer-specified nails (not common nails unless allowed) in all required holes"
  ],
  "rationale": "A hanger that does not fit the joist size will not develop the intended bearing and fastener engagement, reducing load capacity and creating a non-compliant connection. Since materials are staged but not yet installed, the corrective action is to swap the hanger for the correct model before work begins.",

    "Simpson Strong-Tie Joist Hanger Catalog",
    "IRC R502.6/R502.11 - Joist hangers and bearing requirements"
  ]
